idea.title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends Searches For Emergency Dental Care Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Xly
idea.thesis: A sudden increase in emergency dental care searches often precedes discretionary spending rebounds after stress periods. Consumer discretionary spending tends to rebound as urgent health-related stress eases.
idea.signal_logic: Enter long XLY if weekly search interest for 'emergency dental care' rises by 15%+ over prior 2 weeks
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLY if weekly search interest for 'emergency dental care' rises by 15%+ over prior 2 weeks Exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if interest falls below prior 2-week average
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly searches via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Dental emergency searches fluctuate often with consumer stress cycles and will reliably spike multiple times yearly.
